framework.name: Agent Identity is Heuristic, Not Cryptographic
framework.description: Vouched's CEO explicitly states no established agent identification mechanism exists. Their approach is proprietary heuristic-based (like spam detection), not DID/VC/X.509. This contradicts the assumption that crypto-primitive approaches are emerging — the market leader is using pattern matching, not identity standards.
framework.raw_quote: There is no established mechanism, so we created a proprietary heuristic, which works much like spam detection.

source.title: Agentic AI identity verification startup Vouched gets $17M to build trust in autonomous agents - SiliconANGLE
